g.text: OAuth 2.0 + PKCE authorization code flow with token refresh
Initiate MFA challenge for user u_456
Verify TOTP code for session mfa_789
TOTP verified: valid within time window ±1
Create session: {user_id: u_456, auth_time: now, amr: [pwd, otp]}
Deep link: callback with authorization code
POST /token {grant_type: authorization_code, code: auth_code_xyz, code_verifier: original_verifier, redirect_uri: app://callback}
Lookup auth code, verify not expired and not reused
Validate refresh token, check revocation list
PKCE prevents authorization code interception — no client_secret needed for public clients
